# kraftwerk

> An opinionated fullstack monorepo boilerplate.

## About

kraftwerk (German: /ˈkʁaftvɛʁk/ — power plant, factory) is a production-ready fullstack monorepo boilerplate for building scalable applications with a modern TypeScript stack.

## Tech Stack

- **Turborepo** — Incremental builds, remote caching
- **pnpm** — Fast, disk-efficient package manager
- **TypeScript** — Strict mode, ESM-only
- **Biome** — Unified linting and formatting
- **React 19** — Latest patterns, Vite 6, Tailwind CSS v4
- **Elysia + Bun** — Fast, type-safe API server
- **Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL** — TypeScript-first database layer
- **Vitest** — Fast unit testing

## Workspace Structure

```
kraftwerk/
├── packages/
│   ├── frontend/         # Vite + React app
│   ├── backend/          # Elysia + Bun API server
│   ├── config/           # Shared Biome, TypeScript, Vitest configs
│   └── ui/               # Design system with Storybook
├── docs/                 # Specification and guides
└── .github/              # CI/CD workflows
```

## Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/w-arantes/kraftwerk.git
cd kraftwerk
pnpm install
cp .env.example .env
pnpm db:up
pnpm dev
```

## AI Development

This project includes AI-ready tooling:

- **AGENTS.md** — Universal AI agent instructions
- **.github/copilot-instructions.md** — GitHub Copilot instructions
